raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no ta kas atteck/ dar-
ra wiꞥſch weenu Deewekli fewim
par Elku / preeſch ta mettahs
wiꞥſch Zeltôß/ un paſlannahs/
un peeluḣds to/ un fakka: Iſ-
pesti mann/ jo tu effi mans
Deewß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee ne atſihſt nedß fa-
proht/ jo tasirr winnu Azzisais-
lippinajs/ ka tee ne redß/ un wiꞥ-
ko Sirdi/ ka tee ne ſaproht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nerweens jem to pee
taws Pestitajs/ un taws Iſtai-
Sirdß/ un newaid Atſibſchanas fitajs no Mahtes Meefahm. Es
ieb Sapraſchanas/ ka tas buktu
eſmu tas KUNGS/ kas wiſſu
Fazzijs: Weenu Puſſi eſmu es darra/ kas to Debbeſi iſplatta/
ar Ugguni fadeſfinajs/ un arri
es weens pats/ un kas to Sem-
as winna Ohglehin Maisi zep-
mi teſtaipa zaur ſew paſchu.
pts/ es eſmu Galtu pee ta zeppie
un ehdiß / bij nu man to/ kas
atleek par Negantibu darriht? ka
nan bij preeſch ta Zeltôß me-
tees/ kas no Kohka irr iſaudſis?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch barrojaß ar
Pihſchiein / winna peewilta
Sirds leek winnu malditees/ ta
a wiꞥſch ſawu Dwehteli ne
varr iſglahbt / tomehr wiꞥſch
ee fakka: Irrag Wiltiba manna
abbá Kohka?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Beentnuti ſcho Jehkab/
n Iſrael/ jo tu effi mans Kalps/
s eſmu tewt padarrijs/ tu effi
mans Kalps/ Iſrael ne * aiſmitr-
i mannis.
* Eebr.Wall: ir ta : Tu ne tapſi no man-
m aiſmit ſts
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es iſdelou tawas Pahr-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gawilejeet juhs Debbe-
fis/ jo tas KUNGS irr to dar-
rijs/ ſauzeet preezigi juhs Sem-
mes Diſtumi/ juhs Kalni dar-
rajt weenu Trohktui ar Preeku
Dseeſinahm / juhs Mescht un
wiſſi Kohki eekſch ta/ jo tas
KUNGS irr Jehkabu atpeſtijs/
un Iſraelu pagohdinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas to Sihlneeku Siḫ-
mes iſnihzina/ un tohs Swaigſ-
nu- Zeenitajus trakkus darra-
Kas tohs Gudrus leek atpakak
greestees/ un winno Sinnascha-
nu par Geckibu darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas to Wahrdiu fatwa
Kalpa apſtiprina/ un tam Pa-
dohmann ſawn Wehſineſchn leek
iſdohtees/ kas us Jeruſalemitaē-
ka : Tobpi attak eedſihwota/ un
us teem Pilsfahteem Juhda:
Juhß tapſect attak uſtaiziti/ un
eß uſtaitiſchu winnas pohtas
Weetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas es fakka us to dſiktu
Uhdeni/ iſkalsti : Un tawus
Strautus es iſschahweſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kas no Koreſa fatka :
Wiꞥſch irr mans Gans/ un pa-
darrihs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
